steps.t: Lost Huorns can be found throughout southern Fangorn Forest. Quickbeam's Huorn wants you to help search for young Huorns in Fangorn Forest.
Derndingle can be found in south-eastern Fangorn Forest. You have gathered as many young Huorns as you could find, and should now return to Derndingle…
Quickbeam can be found in Derndingle in south-eastern Fangorn Forest. You have delivered the lost Huorns to safety at Quickbeam's side in Derndingle. …
